headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on Cognizant Tech Solns, Lowers Price Target to $88
summary: Susquehanna  analyst James Friedman   maintains Cognizant Tech Solns (NASDAQ:CTSH) with a Positive and lowers the price target from $98 to $88.
